meta.title: DEF CON 32 - Exposing the Occultations in Large Off-Grid Solar Systems - Dan Berte & Alexandru Lazar
meta.description: This talk reveals stunning vulnerability findings in leading solar manufacturers that, when exploited, the stake is the grid. We'll explore three massive vulns in the management platform and discuss how they can be weaponized to become chilling nation security risks.
